name: Muckraker From the Underworld
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>特</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>派</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>員</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>デスキャスター
name_jp_tl: Correspondent from the Demon World - Death Caster
desc:
2 Effect Monsters
Cannot be used as Link Material the turn it is Link Summoned. If a monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can Tribute 1 Fiend monster instead. You can target 1 Fiend monster in your GY, except "Muckraker From the Underworld"; discard 1 card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fiend monsters. You can only use this effect of "Muckraker From the Underworld" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
Cannot be used as a Link Material the turn it is Link Summoned
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
